creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Here is another symbol that causes the assertion: _ZZN10half_float6detail15half2float_implEjfNSt3__117integral_constantIbLb1EEEE14exponent_table (from the object file merge-dequantize-operators.cpp.o from the port misc/nn-insight).

This one is not for a lambda function.
